= now


Returns the current timestamp as an RFC 3339 formatted string with nanosecond precision. Use this to add processing timestamps to messages or measure time between events. Chain with &#x60;ts_format&#x60; to customize the format or timezone.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.received_at = now()
----

[,bloblang]
----
# Format the timestamp in a custom format and timezone.

root.received_at = now().ts_format("Mon Jan 2 15:04:05 -0700 MST 2006", "UTC")
----
